phase3_findings.description: bundle [ -s ] member check does not cover readability; unchecked cat drops an unreadable member silently (vacuous absence guards)

entry-gate assertion pins the path token, not the mandatory-read/fail-closed framing
bundle header comment claims line-ordering guards use the bundle and 'every call site unchanged'; contradicted by the positional-guard carve-out

no version bump + CHANGELOG for a consumer-shipping skills/ change; confirm intent or record the no-bump decision

bundle uniqueness pins couple orchestrator stubs to phase bodies (spurious RED if a stub restates a pinned literal) — by-design stub-collision guard
